summary: P0 UI HOTFIX VALIDATED - Admin panel horizontal overflow regression FIXED. All viewports (1280x720, 1366x768, 1440x900, 1920x1080) show NO page-level horizontal overflow. All 9 admin sections load without overflow at 1280x720. Users section functionality (search, filters, row click, copy buttons) all working.

hotfix_validation.issue: Admin panel content clipped on smaller monitors - horizontal overflow regression
fixes_applied: .admin-content CSS: width: calc(100vw - 240px), max-width: calc(100vw - 240px), overflow-x: auto
Table card: overflow-x-auto for contained scrolling

critical_code_review_comments: CSS fix in App.css lines 200-208 correctly constrains .admin-content width and enables overflow-x:auto
Filter grid responsive change (grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5) ensures all 5 filters fit on smaller screens
Table card overflow-x-auto (AdminUsersSection.js line 265) allows table horizontal scroll without page overflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 UI HOTFIX VALIDATED. Admin panel horizontal overflow regression is FIXED. No page-level horizontal overflow at any tested viewport (1280x720, 1366x768, 1440x900, 1920x1080). All admin sections load without overflow. Table has contained horizontal scroll. All filters visible at 1280px width.
